prompt: Vintage 1970s cinematic fashion photography, editorial style. A poised young woman sits on weathered stone café steps, cradling a rich forest-green ceramic mug trimmed with a delicate gold rim. Her gaze meets the camera with quiet confidence, expression serene and timeless. Soft natural waves frame her face. Beauty: deep matte crimson lips, subtle winged eyeliner, warm-toned blush, gently defined brows. Outfit: relaxed forest-green knitted sweater, flowing black tulle skirt drifting lightly. An earthy plaid scarf in burnt orange and muted burgundy draped at the neck; dark-green leather crossbody bag with ornate gold hardware resting nearby. Backdrop: autumn café street, amber window glow, scattered fallen leaves, soft urban quiet. Shot at 85mm f/1.8, shallow depth of field, warm analog film grain, muted earthy palette, dreamy cinematic mood, ultra-realistic fashion editorial photography.
